speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: We did observe.—Cousin Aumerle,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: How far brought you high Hereford on his way?

speaker: AUMERLE
text: I brought high Hereford, if you call him so,

speaker: AUMERLE
text: But to the next highway, and there I left him.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: And say, what store of parting tears were shed?

speaker: AUMERLE
text: Faith, none for me, except the northeast wind,

speaker: AUMERLE
text: Which then blew bitterly against our faces,

speaker: AUMERLE
text: Awaked the sleeping rheum and so by chance

speaker: AUMERLE
text: Did grace our hollow parting with a tear.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: What said our cousin when you parted with him?

speaker: AUMERLE
text: “Farewell.”

speaker: AUMERLE
text: And, for my heart disdainèd that my tongue

speaker: AUMERLE
text: Should so profane the word, that taught me craft

speaker: AUMERLE
text: To counterfeit oppression of such grief

speaker: AUMERLE
text: That words seemed buried in my sorrow’s grave.

speaker: AUMERLE
text: Marry, would the word “farewell” have lengthened hours

speaker: AUMERLE
text: And added years to his short banishment,

speaker: AUMERLE
text: He should have had a volume of farewells.

speaker: AUMERLE
text: But since it would not, he had none of me.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: He is our cousin, cousin, but ’tis doubt,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: When time shall call him home from banishment,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Whether our kinsman come to see his friends.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Ourself and Bushy, Bagot here and Green,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Observed his courtship to the common people,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: How he did seem to dive into their hearts

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: With humble and familiar courtesy,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: What reverence he did throw away on slaves,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Wooing poor craftsmen with the craft of smiles

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: And patient underbearing of his fortune,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: As ’twere to banish their affects with him.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Off goes his bonnet to an oysterwench;

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: A brace of draymen bid God speed him well

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: And had the tribute of his supple knee,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: With “Thanks, my countrymen, my loving friends,”

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: As were our England in reversion his

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: And he our subjects’ next degree in hope.

speaker: GREEN
text: Well, he is gone, and with him go these thoughts.

speaker: GREEN
text: Now for the rebels which stand out in Ireland,

speaker: GREEN
text: Expedient manage must be made, my liege,

speaker: GREEN
text: Ere further leisure yield them further means

speaker: GREEN
text: For their advantage and your Highness’ loss.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: We will ourself in person to this war.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: And, for our coffers, with too great a court

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: And liberal largess, are grown somewhat light,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: We are enforced to farm our royal realm,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: The revenue whereof shall furnish us

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: For our affairs in hand. If that come short,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Our substitutes at home shall have blank charters,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Whereto, when they shall know what men are rich,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: They shall subscribe them for large sums of gold

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: And send them after to supply our wants,

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: For we will make for Ireland presently.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Bushy, what news?

speaker: BUSHY
text: Old John of Gaunt is grievous sick, my lord,

speaker: BUSHY
text: Suddenly taken, and hath sent posthaste

speaker: BUSHY
text: To entreat your Majesty to visit him.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Where lies he?

speaker: BUSHY
text: At Ely House.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Now put it, God, in the physician’s mind

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: To help him to his grave immediately!

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: The lining of his coffers shall make coats

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: To deck our soldiers for these Irish wars.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Come, gentlemen, let’s all go visit him.

speaker:
KING
               
              RICHARD
text: Pray God we may make haste and come too late.

speaker: ALL
text: Amen!
